lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you teach me the basics of smelting please?

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: You'll need to have mined some ore to smelt first. Go see the mining tutor to the south if you're not sure how to do this.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: I see you have some ore with you to smelt, so let's get started.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: Click on the furnace to bring up a menu of metal bars you can try to make from your ore.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: When you have a full inventory, take it to the bank, you can find it on the roof of the castle in Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: If you have a hammer with you, you can smith the bronze bars into equipment on the anvil outside.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: I'm afraid the weather over the years has rusted it down, so it can only be used to work bronze.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: Alternatively you can run up to Varrock. Look for my Master, the Smithing Tutor, in the west of the city, he can help you smith better gear.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I already know about the basics of smelting, got any tips?

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: I find it useful to stockpile my ore before smelting it in one go, or even do it on the way to the bank in such places as Al Kharid or Falador. But you can do it anyway you want, one load at a time is fine too!

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: Not too much can go wrong with smelting.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: You will lose some iron when smelting that ore, but a Ring of Forging or the Superheat Item spell will soon solve that.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: You should also investigate Keldagrim, the dwarven city, you may find better places to smelt your ore with friends.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do I do after smelting the ore?

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: Ahh you'll need to learn to smith. Go to Varrock, that's where my master, the Smithing Tutor, plies his trade. Ask him to teach you how to smith.

lines.speaker: Smithing apprentice
lines.text: Smelt some ore and store it in the bank. Grab a hammer from the general store before you go too!
